rationale: Round-3 fix (45b34ee7) is CLI-layer only and preserves both invariants I approved in R1/R2. (1) Zero-internal-diff HOLDS: `git diff 45ae7577 45b34ee7 -- internal/panel/gate.go internal/panel/panel.go internal/instruct internal/complete` is empty; the only internal change is create.go's +13 (R3 Gate metadata field, omitempty, decision-inert). tallyExitAction is STILL 2-arg (d, slug); only sanitizeNonBeadDecision (added gitErr error) and tallyExitActionNonBead changed signatures — both cmd/mindspec. (2) R1 NOT regressed: sanitizeNonBeadDecision still rewrites every non-bead leg and mutates only d.Message, never d.Action. Leg-5b now rebuilds its whole sentence from escapeConfigValue(gitErr.Error()) — identity for clean inputs, so semantically equivalent, and only fires when gitErr!=nil (which is exactly when the shared template emits that fragment). (3) Pins GREEN: all NonBead|Sanitize|PanelVerify|PanelTally|GitErr tests pass, incl. the new TestPanelVerbs_NonBeadGitErrHostileTargetEscaped and existing hostile-target/R1 pins; hostile NUL/ESC/newline target renders escaped, never raw. Fence still holds.

findings.note: Zero-internal-diff verified empty on gate.go/panel.go/instruct/complete; sole internal delta is create.go +13 (R3 Gate field, omitempty, byte-identical output when omitted).
tallyExitAction unchanged (2-arg). Fix commit 45b34ee7 touches only cmd/mindspec/panel.go + panel_test.go.

Leg-5b escape-fix is semantically equivalent for clean inputs; escapeConfigValue is identity on clean strings and Action is never mutated. Full test suite green including new GitErr hostile-target pin.
